notes: Level 5 manual review override shard for spell indexes 45-49 in generated discovery row order.

seeming::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster can choose same or different appearances for multiple targets, but runtime lacks typed disguise option fields.

seeming::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Unwilling targets can make a Charisma save to be unaffected, and Study can reveal the disguise with Intelligence (Investigation); runtime keeps both checks in prose.
seeming::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add unwilling-target save and inspection-check fields.

seeming::vision_light_sound.issue: The illusion changes visible body/equipment appearance and apparent height/weight; runtime lacks typed visual illusion fields.
seeming::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add visual disguise fields for apparent size/weight/body/equipment changes.

seeming::illusion_or_disguise.issue: The spell's core disguise constraints, physical-inspection failure, and Study action reveal mechanics are prose-only.
seeming::illusion_or_disguise.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion/disguise constraint and reveal fields.

skill-empowerment::choice_or_mode.issue: The caster chooses one proficient skill not already benefiting from expertise; runtime lacks selected-skill and eligibility fields.

skill-empowerment::attack_or_save_modifi.issue: The target doubles proficiency for ability checks using the chosen skill; runtime lacks an ability-check/proficiency modifier effect.

skill-empowerment::message_or_communicat.issue: The detector matched descriptive understanding prose; the mechanical effect is skill expertise, not communication.

skill-empowerment::conditional_ending.issue: The expertise lasts until the normal spell duration ends and has no special conditional ending.

steel-wind-strike::choice_or_mode.issue: The up-to-five visible creature target choice is represented by multi targeting and maxTargets 5.

steel-wind-strike::target_filter_or_elig.issue: Runtime now has teleport movement, but the destination must be an unoccupied visible space within 5 feet of a hit-or-missed target; that secondary destination filter is not typed.
steel-wind-strike::target_filter_or_elig.recommendedTemplateChange: Add teleport destination fields for unoccupied visible space near any attacked target.

steel-wind-strike::vision_light_sound.issue: Visible initial targets are represented by lineOfSight; the visible teleport destination is tracked under target_filter_or_eligibility.

steel-wind-strike::travel_or_planar_move.issue: The optional 5-foot teleport after attacks is now represented as a MOVEMENT teleport effect.

steel-wind-strike::environmental_change.issue: The vanish/strike wording is presentation for attack and teleport delivery, not an environmental change.

swift-quiver::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The bonus-action two-attack grant is now represented as a granted action.
swift-quiver::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No new attack modifier field required for this pass.

swift-quiver::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: The each-turn bonus action to make two ammunition-weapon attacks is now represented as a granted action.
swift-quiver::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: No new sustain-action field required for this pass.

swift-quiver::vision_light_sound.issue: Ammunition leaping into the hand is descriptive delivery of the created ammunition, not a separate vision/light/sound mechanic.

swift-quiver::illusion_or_disguise.issue: The quiver is transmuted and creates ammunition; no illusion or disguise is involved.

swift-quiver::conditional_ending.issue: Runtime now has created-ammunition cleanup, but still lacks the typed ending if the quiver leaves the caster's possession.
swift-quiver::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add or reuse possession-based conditional-ending fields for the quiver leaving possession.
swift-quiver::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data for the quiver leaving possession.

swift-quiver::aftermath_or_memory.issue: Created ammunition disintegrates when the spell ends; runtime lacks typed cleanup/aftermath data.
swift-quiver::aftermath_or_memory.closedReason: Closed by the created-object cleanup batch: structured markdown and runtime JSON now use effects[].endCleanup[] with created_ammunition, created_objects, all_remaining, and disintegrate on spell end.

synaptic-static::choice_or_mode.issue: The chosen point and 20-foot-radius sphere are represented by area targeting.

synaptic-static::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Initial damage and repeat save are represented, but the d6 penalty to attack rolls, ability checks, and Constitution concentration saves remains only implicit in the Muddled Thoughts status.
synaptic-static::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add multi-surface d6 penalty fields for attack rolls, ability checks, and concentration saves.

synaptic-static::repeat_save_or_recurrin.issue: The end-of-turn Intelligence repeat save is now represented with the correct save ability.

synaptic-static.title: Target Filters And Eligibility
synaptic-static.canonicalEvidence: A creature with an Intelligence score of 2 or lower can't be affected by this spell.
synaptic-static.jsonState: Runtime has no validated ability-score threshold filter.
synaptic-static.issue: The spell excludes creatures with Intelligence 2 or lower, but the current targeting schema has no first-class ability-score maximum filter.
synaptic-static.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by ability-threshold propagation: structured markdown now records the target ability, operator, and threshold value.
synaptic-static.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by ability-threshold propagation: targeting.filter.abilityThreshold now carries the matching runtime facts.
synaptic-static.reviewerNote: Closed because this target-filter finding is fully represented by the new abilityThreshold fields.
